title: Fast Fiction Factory One-story Draft Review Pack
selected_candidate_title: Mira and the brass moth clue trail
selected_reason: Selected as the strongest end-to-end provisional route because it connects hook, personal stakes, object clue, investigation, visual packaging, and unresolved human-owned questions without requiring final canon.
source_memo_cue: Mira Vale repairs clocks in North Bell Station after midnight. Her brother Toma left only a note, a brass moth in the workshop drawer, and a warning that the council has been buying abandoned minutes from people's lives.
source_cue: Raw story memo and local deterministic Designer Dashboard candidates only.
logline: A clockmaker follows her missing brother's brass moth clue into a city ledger that sells abandoned minutes.
premise: A personal mystery follows Toma's note into the council ledger without deciding Toma fate, moth function, or Council motive.

channel_strategy_route.audience: viewers who follow clues, institutions, and hidden-world rules across episodes
channel_strategy_route.fit: The source material has unresolved motives and repeatable evidence objects.

draft_spine.sample_opening: At noon, the old observatory rang again. Mira Vale looked up from the station clock and counted the sound of a bell that had not existed since the winter curfew.
draft_spine.narration_draft_excerpt: This is not the story's final truth. It is a review pass: a missing bell, a missing brother, and a brass moth that may be a key, a spy, or only the shape grief chose.

beats.label: Cold open
beats.beat: The bellless observatory rings at noon, making the missing bell the first impossible image.
beats.visual_cue: Show North Bell Station and the silent tower before explaining rules.
beats.subtitle_cue: At noon, the bell that no longer existed rang once.

beats.label: Personal clue
beats.beat: Mira finds Toma's note and the brass moth in the workshop drawer.
beats.visual_cue: Cut to hands, note, brass moth, and a station-clock face stuck near 9:17.
beats.subtitle_cue: Toma left only a note and a brass moth.

beats.label: Investigation path
beats.beat: The council ledger connects abandoned minutes to erased people.
beats.visual_cue: Use ledger-page inserts and names fading from civic records.
beats.subtitle_cue: Some names were paid for in minutes.

beats.label: Human-owned fork
beats.beat: The draft keeps Toma fate, moth function, and Council motive unresolved instead of choosing truth.
beats.visual_cue: Hold on three labeled cards: Toma, moth, Council.
beats.subtitle_cue: These answers stay held for author review.

beats.label: Reviewable ending pressure
beats.beat: Mira may return one lost hour to each erased person, but the ending is not canon.
beats.visual_cue: End on the ledger closing, then a final impossible bell note.

visual_cues.title: Bellless tower silhouette
visual_cues.cue: Opening image; empty bell frame, noon light, no release asset selected.

visual_cues.title: Brass moth closeup
visual_cues.cue: Object clue; macro shot direction only, function unresolved.

visual_cues.title: Council ledger page
visual_cues.cue: Investigation bridge; names and minutes shown as graphic placeholders.

visual_cues.title: Held truth cards
visual_cues.cue: Operator-facing reminder that Toma, moth, and Council answers are not decided.

subtitle_or_text_cues.title: At noon, the missing bell rang.
subtitle_or_text_cues.cue: Short hook subtitle; keeps paradox clear.

subtitle_or_text_cues.title: Toma left only a note.
subtitle_or_text_cues.cue: Narration cue; avoids deciding Toma fate.

subtitle_or_text_cues.title: The ledger named lives no one remembered.
subtitle_or_text_cues.cue: Premise cue; avoids final Council motive.

risk_cards.finding: The pack uses unresolved story truths as visible review questions, not final answers.
risk_cards.next_move: Choose provisional routes before any final prose or canon adoption.

risk_cards.finding: All visual and thumbnail cues are text-only placeholders with unknown rights.
risk_cards.next_move: Do not source or imply release assets in this slice.

risk_cards.finding: No render, upload, provider call, public action, or AI video generation exists.
risk_cards.next_move: Treat this as local review planning only.

risk_cards.finding: Sample narration is non-final and non-canon.
risk_cards.next_move: Review beats and cues before expanding prose.

recommended_reviewer_decisions.title: Confirm or replace provisional default candidate
recommended_reviewer_decisions.decision_prompt: Approve designer-content-moth-investigation-3m as the first draft route or choose another Designer Dashboard candidate.

recommended_reviewer_decisions.title: Confirm channel route
recommended_reviewer_decisions.decision_prompt: Use mystery-lore serial now, or switch to literary micro-fiction / visual story lab.

recommended_reviewer_decisions.title: Keep or narrow held truth questions
recommended_reviewer_decisions.decision_prompt: Choose which of Toma fate, moth function, and Council motive can remain unknown in the first draft.

validation_notes: One-story Draft Review Pack is local review material only.
The selected candidate is provisional_default because no human candidate choice was supplied.
Sample opening and narration excerpt are non-final and non-canon.

review_surface_counts.detail: content=3; channels=3; beats=5; visual=4; text=4; questions=3; risks=4; decisions=3
